titleStmt.title: SII 15.158: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 158. (B.K. No. 62 of 1929-30.) SARŪR, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone standing before the Basavēśvara temple.
This is dated the 11th regnal year of the king, Pramōdūta, Āshāḍha-puṇṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1210 A.D., July 8. The weekday, however, was Thursday.
It records a gift of land and two houses to the god Mallikārjuna at Saraūr after purchase from Sivagauḍa who installed the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu
yādōnarāyaṇa praReadyādavanārāyaṇa
tāpa cakrava¨rtti siṁhaṇadē
va varisada 11 neya bra(pra)mō
di(dū)ta sauta�ssarada Āsaḍa sudha
puṇami sōmavāradaṁdu sara
Ūra Araḷigeṟeya kōḍiya ma
llikā¨rjunadēvara sidharāmataṁdeprati
ṣṭamāḍida sivagauḍana kayalu manne
yanu hoṁna koṭu koṁḍa keyi Ūriṁda teṁka
Araḷigeṟeya keyiṁ paḍuvalu mallinā
tha dēvara keyi mataru 1 gaḷatiga maneya
hiṁde dēvara mane Erḍu . Arasana haḷiya vīra gavu
ḍana kayalu maṁkayanu hoṁna koṭṭu Ā holadaluna
keṟeyiṁbaḍaga saraūra sīmeyalu Arasana haḷiya
holadalu saraūraṁ malināthadēvarige mataru 1
vāgineredu Āydumaṟe [Aḷavari toḷitāyi]
gaḷu sidharāma makaḷu dalavara hesara
hāgavaṁ biṭha malināta naḍeva honuguṁda
va bīcaguru taṁna maga guruvige maṁkayana
malināthadēvare stānava dhārāpū¨rvvaka māḍi koṭṭaru ©
hāga haneraḍu hāgada phalavakku . I dha
¨rmmava pratipāḷisidavaru dēvagati I dha¨rmmake vakravāda nā
yakanaThe letter na is written above the line.raka . bīcaguruvinamakaḷu sivalōka OḍeyaruThe inscription is faulty.
Digital edition of SII 15.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
